name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes delayed financial reporting. We automate bookkeeping instead of manual bookkeeping processes.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of transactions leads to delayed financial reporting
